tasks.subject: Task 1: Add isManyToManyJoinEntity flag + recordVersionHistory validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EntityDef knows it was built via manyToManyEntity(); manyToManyEntity(recordVersionHistory=true,...) rejects effective-timestamp joins.

**Files:**
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityDef.kt:44-84,496-527
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/EntityDefBuilder.kt:49-64,136-168
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/AbstractSpec.kt:476-556

See plan Task 1 for exact diffs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/EntityDefBuilder.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/AbstractSpec.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:compileKotlin :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:compileKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isManyToManyJoinEntity flag added", "validation throws for effective-timestamp joins", "compiles"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: EntityHistoryBlotterDef column + path rules for join history
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Join-entity history blotter shows FK columns + createdTimestampUtc/changeType/createdBy (excludes id/version), and exposes global (non-{entityId}-scoped) endpoint/route paths.

**Files:**
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityHistoryBlotterDef.kt

See plan Task 2 for exact code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/EntityHistoryBlotterDef.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:compileKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["join-aware blotterColumns", "global endpoint/route paths for join history"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Global search/count REST chain for join entity history
tasks.description:
**Goal:** For join-entity history, search/count work globally (no entityId param/filter) across Dao -> Repo -> SearchService -> Endpoint. Regular entity history unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterRowDtoDaoRenderer.kt
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterRowDtoRepoRenderer.kt
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterSearchServiceRenderer.kt
- Modify: maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterSearchEndpointRenderer.kt

See plan Task 3 for exact code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterRowDtoDaoRenderer.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterRowDtoRepoRenderer.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterSearchServiceRenderer.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/EntityHistoryBlotterSearchEndpointRenderer.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:compileKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["global search/count chain for join history", "regular entity history unchanged"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Enable recordVersionHistory on LeftToRightSimpleJoin and regenerate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Showcase fixture exercises the feature end to end - history table, DAO, blotter REST endpoint generated for LeftToRightSimpleJoinEntity.

**Files:**

- Regenerate: maia-showcase/domain, dao, repo, service, web src/generated

See plan Task 4.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Integration test - join history rows written and queryable via REST
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify adding/removing LeftToRightSimpleJoin pairs writes CREATE/DELETE history rows, queryable via global history search endpoint.
